rationale: Re-express every needed post-state fact as a *logical implication* `(ensures-conjuncts) ==> consequence`, so each assertion is provable from pure logic/set-theory without depending on the original function's ensures being in scope at body level (which is why the prior bare assertions failed). The chained implications give z3 enough hints to discharge the outer `P ==> det_equal` obligation when it eventually adds P to its context.
